title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 403.300 - Nonliability of corporation and transfer agent
text:
403.300.  Nonliability of corporation and transfer agent. — A corporation or transfer agent incurs no liability to any person by making a transfer or otherwise acting in a manner authorized by sections 403.250 to 403.350.
(L. 1959 S.B. 241 § 6)
